name: Delta SkyMiles® Gold American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: As-high-as offer: find out if you are eligible for up to 80,000 Bonus Miles after eligible purchases in the first 6 months.
notes: Delta comparison page shows Gold as "As High As 80,000 Miles" after the 7/15/2026 limited-time offer window; search snippets indicate $2,000 eligible purchases in the first 6 months.
Previous public limited-time 7/15/2026 offer was removed from current production values to avoid displaying an expired offer.

earning_rates.notes: Worldwide, including takeout and delivery in the U.S.

other_benefits.name: Free Checked Bag
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for you and up to 8 companions on Delta flights, saving up to $35-$315 per round trip.

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Zone 5 priority boarding on Delta flights for you and up to 8 companions.

other_benefits.name: In-Flight Discount
other_benefits.description: 20% statement credit on eligible Delta in-flight purchases (food, alcoholic beverages, headsets).

other_benefits.name: 15% Off Award Travel
other_benefits.description: 15% off when using miles to book Award Travel on Delta flights through delta.com and the Fly Delta app.

other_benefits.name: Second Checked Bag Free
other_benefits.description: Second checked bag free on domestic Delta-operated flights for eligible Basic Delta SkyMiles Gold, Platinum, and Reserve Card Members; terms apply.

insurance.notes: Trip delay insurance requires delay >12 hours. Baggage insurance covers up to $1,250 for carry-on and $500 for checked bags.

sources.notes: Current offer, rewards rate, benefits, offer history
Annual fee, foreign transaction fee, benefits details
Delta personal card comparison page with current limited-time welcome offers and benefits
Delta News Hub official announcement: limited-time welcome offers and 2026 benefit updates

recurring_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10/month statement credit on eligible U.S. rideshare purchases with select providers after Card renewal. Enrollment required.
